title: DeepSeek-V3 Technical Report
preview: Full technical report on DeepSeek-V3, a large sparse MoE model with Multi-head Latent Attention and cost-efficient FP8 training.
summary: Describes DeepSeek-V3 architecture including DeepSeekMoE with shared and routed experts, Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) for KV cache compression, and an FP8 mixed-precision training pipeline. Covers infrastructure decisions including load balancing, expert routing, and pipeline parallelism at 2048 H800 scale.
datacenter: Highly relevant to sparse model infrastructure planning. Documents real training costs, interconnect requirements, and achievable MFU for a frontier MoE model. FP8 training pipeline details are directly applicable to next-generation training cluster design.
metrics: Key result signal: 2.788M H800 GPU-hours for full pre-training at a cost of approximately $5.5M USD.
